name: standards closed-loop validation verifies the promoted rule provenance class is published-standard
command: mkdir -p active-rules && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/closed-loop-validate.sh" --synthetic-source test-std --rules-out active-rules 2>out.txt && grep -q 'class: published-standard' active-rules/test-std-1-1.yaml && grep -q 'verify=provenance_class_published_standard' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
